title: Clantaani
content:
{{Top|ffa|leg|canon=Clantanni}} {{Species |image=[[File:LongoDosPistolas.jpg]] |name=Clantaani |designation=[[Sentience/Legends|Sentient]][[Star Wars: Bounty Hunter: Prima's Official Strategy Guide|''Star Wars: Bounty Hunter'': Prima's Official Strategy Guide]] |class= |subspecies= |races= |height= |length= |wingspan= |mass= |skincolor=*[[Color/Legends|Blue]]''[[Star Wars: Bounty Hunter]]'' *Orange *White *Pink{{GamerCite|10|State of the Arts}} |haircolor=White |feathers= |eyecolor= |distinctions=*Four-fingered hands *Puggish snout *Floppy, pointed ears |lifespan= |origin=[[Clantaano III]]{{CSWECite|I|128|Clantaani}}. |habitat= |diet= |language= }} {{Quote|Longo Two-Guns is holed up in a podracer hangar on the far side of town. Be careful: The whole place is under his gang's control. They've chased off or killed every mercenary Jabba has sent after them.''"''
''"''You worry too much, Roz.''"''
''"''Well, somebody has to worry for you.|The [[Toydarian]] [[Rozatta]] and Jango Fett about the Clantaani Longo Two-Guns|}} The '''Clantaani''' or '''Clantaanis''' were a [[Species/Legends|species]] of [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]], long-[[Ear/Legends|eared]] [[Humanoid/Legends|humanoids]] from the arid [[Planet/Legends|world]] of [[Clantaano III]]. The Clantaani lived in marauding, nomadic tribes that fought endlessly over the limited resources of their [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]]. In [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]] at large, Clantaani preferred to live on planets similar to Clantaano III, such as [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]]—a place that also drew them due to its disproportionate number of criminals. Clantaani [[Pirate/Legends|pirates]] and bandits stole regularly from [[Crime lord/Legends|crime lords]] such as the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutts]] and returned home with their booty. A Clantaani known as [[Longo Two-Guns]] ran a criminal [[Longo Two-Guns Gang|gang]] headquartered on Tatooine; after the bandit angered [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba Desilijic Tiure]], the Hutt placed a [[Bounty/Legends|bounty]] on Two-Guns, [[Death/Legends|dead]] or alive, in [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]]. The [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Jango Fett/Legends|Jango Fett]] claimed the reward, along with other bounties placed on Clantaani members of Two-Guns's gang. ==Biology and appearance== The Clantaani,{{CSWECite|III|271|Two-Guns, Longo}}. or Clantaanis, were a [[Species/Legends|species]] of [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]], wiry [[Humanoid/Legends|humanoids]] with skin that varied in [[Color/Legends|coloration]] from blue to orange, mottled with pink and white. They had four-fingered [[Limb/Legends|hands]]. The Clantaani face was characterized by a heavy yet expressive brow that overhung two small [[Eye/Legends|eyes]]. A pinkish [[Nose/Legends|nose]] extended from close below the eyes and above the long jaw. The puggish snout ended in a [[Mouth/Legends|mouthful]] of pink flesh and white, peglike [[Tooth/Legends|teeth]]. A pair of long, floppy, pointed [[Ear/Legends|ears]] jutted from either side of the head. Some Clantaani grew white mustaches. ==Society and culture== {{Quote|I've heard about you, Fett. You're pretty good. No bounty hunter's ever made it this far. Think you can outshoot me ''and'' my boys?''"''
''"''Makes it more difficult.''"''
''"''Hear that, boys? He's scared.''"''
''"''Difficult to decide whether any of you live.|Longo Two-Guns and Jango Fett|}} The Clantaani lived in nomadic tribes who used brigandage and warfare to fight for the scant resources of their [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] [[Clantaano III]]. Clantaani wore [[Clothing/Legends|clothing]] standard for humanoid species in [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]]; for instance, the Clantaani [[Longo Two-Guns]] sported [[Ring/Legends|rings]], a [[Leather/Legends|leather]] vest and chaps, trousers, [[Boot/Legends|boots]], and twin [[Blaster pistol/Legends|blaster pistol]] [[Holster/Legends|holsters]]. A common Clantaani accoutrement was a leather guard that hung from the back of the head. Clantaani were capable of learning to speak [[Galactic Basic Standard/Legends|Basic]]. Their ears twitched as they talked, and members of the species laughed when amused. Members of the species could identify with at least one [[Gender/Legends|gender]]—male. ==History== Native to the dry planet of Clantaano III, the Clantaani evolved to tolerate arid conditions. The world was located in the [[Clantaano system/Legends|Clantaano system]],{{SW|url=news/star-wars-the-essential-atlas-online-companion|text=''Star Wars: The Essential Atlas'' Online Companion|int=Star Wars: The Essential Atlas Online Companion}}. which was integrated into the greater [[Galaxy/Legends|galaxy]] at some point between [[1000 BBY/Legends|1000]] and [[25 BBY/Legends|25 BBY]].''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' The world was eventually incorporated into the [[Albanin sector/Legends|Albanin sector]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]], reachable via the [[Triellus Trade Route/Legends|Triellus Trade Route]], and considered part of [[The Slice/Legends|the Slice]]. By [[20 BBY/Legends|20 BBY]], Clantaano III was in a region of [[Realspace/Legends|space]] controlled by the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutts]], but Hutt influence had retracted by [[14 BBY/Legends|14 BBY]]. Circa [[25 ABY/Legends|25 ABY]], the average population per [[Star system/Legends|system]] in the Clantaani's region was a mere 10 to 100 million beings. By [[137 ABY]], Clantaano III fell within an area known as the [[Hutt dependencies]]. ==Clantaani in the galaxy== {{Quote|You bounty hunters just keep on comin'. When's Jabba gonna learn? There ain't nobody can bring me down, dead or alive.''"''
''"''That's for me to decide.|Longo Two-Guns and Jango Fett|}} [[File:Yellow_Clantaani.jpg|thumb|left|200px|Clantaani thugs made up much of Longo Two-Guns's posse.]] A common practice among Clantaani was to leave their homeworld to ply the [[Hyperspace route/Legends|spacelanes]], raid the stores of galactic criminals, and return with the spoils. When away from Clantaano III, Clantaani preferred planets with dry conditions similar to those of home. Similarly, due to their natural propensity to maraud and pillage, members of the species preferred worlds with large criminal elements; both considerations made [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]] a popular destination. Clantaani [[Pirate/Legends|pirates]] were active in the galaxy by [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]].The events of ''[[Star Wars: Bounty Hunter]]'' take place in [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]] according to ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' By that [[Standard year/Legends|year]], the Clantaani Longo Two-Guns had established a reputation as a top-notch [[Gunslinger/Legends|gunslinger]]; in fact, he claimed to be the "fastest [[Weapon/Legends|gun]] in the galaxy." True to his name, the Clantaani wielded a [[Blaster/Legends|blaster]] [[Pistol/Legends|pistol]] in each hand. After building up notoriety as a [[Longo Two-Guns Gang|gang]] leader on Clantaano III,{{SW|url=news/so-uncivilized-great-gunslingers-in-star-wars-part-1|series=So Uncivilized: Great Gunslingers in Star Wars|text=Part 1|nolive=1}} Longo established a base on Tatooine, from which he led a band of outlaws made up mostly of his cousins, including long-time associates [[Radd Hardwikk]]{{CSWECite|II|19|Hardwikk, Radd}}. and [[Klintee|"Deadeye" Klintee]].{{CSWECite|II|222|Klintee, "Deadeye"}}. He attracted non-Clantaani as well, such as [[Nikto/Legends|Nikto]], [[Trandoshan/Legends|Trandoshans]], and [[Weequay/Legends|Weequay]]. The gang operated throughout the Outer Rim, with activities in such locales as [[Mos Espa/Legends|Mos Espa]], [[Nal Hutta/Legends|Nal Hutta]], and [[Mos Gamos]]. Two-Guns and his cronies raided other criminal enterprises and poached business from them; they took regular jobs from [[Gardulla Besadii the Elder/Legends|Gardulla]] the Hutt. [[File:FettLongTwoGuns-SWBH.jpg|thumb|right|300px|Longo Two-Guns and his gang faced off against Jango Fett.]] In 32 BBY, rumors circulated that Two-Guns had the criminal empire of [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba]] the Hutt in his sights and that Gardulla had hired the Clantaani to target [[City/Legends|towns]] on the periphery of Jabba's control as part of a [[Death stick/Legends|death stick]] distribution scheme. Jabba reacted by posting a [[Bounty/Legends|bounty]] on Two-Guns. Meanwhile, several of Two-Guns's associates earned bounties of their own for antagonizing the crime lord. Jabba targeted [[Cahoon|"Black-Eye" Cahoon]] for the kidnapping of [[Slavery/Legends|enslaved]] [[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'leks]], Klintee for a similar kidnapping and for [[Death/Legends|killing]] three of the beings enslaved by the Hutt, [[Rengo|"Dusty" Rengo]] for skimming money from the profits earned by a Tatooine protection agency, [[Clem Vaneer|Clem "Trigger" Vaneer]] for defaulting on a sixty percent loan, and [[Wint|"Wrong-Way" Wint]] for skimming money from the profit earned by a Mos Espa protection agency, and Hardwikk for passing out explosive [[Gorg/Legends|chubas]] at a [[Podracing/Legends|podrace]] in a bid to [[Assassin/Legends|assassinate]] Jabba in [[Mos Eisley/Legends|Mos Eisley]]. This final affront, in conjunction with suspicion of involvement in the distribution of illegal goods and communication technology, also earned Hardwikk a bounty from the [[Mos Eisley Police Authority|Mos Eisley Security Force]]. The gang evaded Jabba's hired thugs for a time, and Longo grew cocky, claiming himself the "fastest blaster on Tatooine" and bragging of his plans to swipe more territory from the Hutt. Jabba upped the bounty on the Clantaani gunslinger to 50,000 [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]], [[Death/Legends|dead]] or alive. [[Bounty hunter/Legends|Bounty hunter]] [[Jango Fett/Legends|Jango Fett]] took notice and set out to claim the reward, thus earning himself an audience with Jabba to seek further information on the [[Bando Gora/Legends|Bando Gora]] cult. Fett pursued the Clantaani crooks to their hideout, the Mos Gamos township on Tatooine. Fett neutralized Longo Two-Guns's men one by one: Wint in a [[Hangar/Legends|docking bay]], Hardwikk in an arena, Rengo in a building, Vaneer and Cahoon in courtyards, and Klintee in a [[Cantina/Legends|cantina]]. The pursuit required Fett to fight through Clantaani thugs and muscle from other species. The bounty hunter finally reached Two-Guns, who was camped out in a podracer hangar. In the ensuing [[Mission to Tatooine (The Hunt)|fray]], Fett bested the Clantaani gunslinger and claimed Jabba's bounty on him,{{CSWECite|III|271|Two-Guns, Longo}}. bringing him in alive. Rumors circulated that Jabba ended the Clantaani's life by sicking his [[Gamorrean/Legends|Gamorrean]] [[executioner]] [[Lomrokk]] on him. ==Behind the scenes== {{Quote|This is it? You're going to keep me in a hole? Me? How long do you think this will hold me, Jabba? How long? When I get out of here, I'm going to …|Longo Two-Guns' last words|''[[Star Wars Mythos]]''}} [[File:Sidshow_Lomrokk_vs_Longo.jpg|thumb|right|200px|Longo meets his end.]] An image of Longo Two-Guns published in [[April]] [[2002]]—part of a [[State of the Arts|preview]] for the [[LucasArts]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars: Bounty Hunter]]''—marks the earliest official depiction of the Clantaani species. The game itself, first released in [[December]] [[2002]], features Clantaani in its fifth level, which pits the bounty hunter Jango Fett against the gang run by Longo Two-Guns on the planet Tatooine. Although defeating Two-Guns himself represents the level's ultimate goal, several of his associates appear as optional, secondary bounties. One of them, "Deadeye" Klintee, bears the name of an effects artist who worked on the game. ''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'', published in [[December]] [[2008]], includes entries for the species itself, Hardwikk, Klintee, and Two-Guns. The entries confirm that Fett claimed the bounties on Hardwikk and Two-Guns, but they do not stipulate whether he caught them dead or alive. As Hardwikk's bounty is higher for a capture rather than a kill, the above scenario assumes such an outcome. The defeat of the other Clantaani depends on total completion of ''Star Wars: Bounty Hunter'', and the above scenario assumes that each bounty was claimed in the fashion—dead or alive—that proved more lucrative. In the cases of Wint, Rengo, Cahoon, and Klintee, capturing the target alive provided Fett a larger reward. However, for Vaneer and Two-Guns, the rewards were identical. In researching the [[Star Wars Legends|Expanded Universe]] lore surrounding Tatooine and the Gamorrean species while preparing the background story for their character Lomrokk,{{WebCite|url=http://www.sideshowtoy.com/experience/entertainment/main-attractions/star-wars-page/star-wars-mythos/mythos-lomrokk/#panels|text=Lomrokk: The Art|work=Star Wars Mythos website|nobackup=1}} the [[Sideshow Collectibles]] artistic team incorporated one version of Longo Two-Guns' fate as part of their non-[[canon]]ical ''[[Star Wars Mythos]]'' line of statues. In the fiction vignette and illustrations associated with the Gamorrean executioner, Jango Fett brings Longo to Jabba the Hutt to claim the bounty on his head. Jabba drops Longo into the pit before his throne, where the Clantaani encounters Lomrokk and meets his end. In "[[So Uncivilized: Great Gunslingers in Star Wars]]," an article posted on the [[StarWars.com]] Blog, author [[Edward M. Erdelac|Ed Erdelac]] mentions the story in his description of Longo Two-Guns, albeit as a rumor about the Clantaani's possible fate. ==Appearances== {{Indexpage}} *''[[Star Wars: Bounty Hunter]]'' {{1st}} ===Non-canon appearances=== *''[[Star Wars Mythos]]'' {{C|canceled}} ==Sources== {{Mediacat|imagecat=Images of Clantaani}} *{{GamerCite|10|State of the Arts}} {{1stp}} *[[Star Wars: Bounty Hunter: Prima's Official Strategy Guide|''Star Wars: Bounty Hunter'': Prima's Official Strategy Guide]] *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' *{{SW|url=news/so-uncivilized-great-gunslingers-in-star-wars-part-1|series=So Uncivilized: Great Gunslingers in Star Wars|text=Part 1|nolive=1}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |es=Clantaani }} [[Category:Outer Rim Territories sentient species]] {{RelatedCategories |[[Category:Clantaani]] }}
